---
title: Training for Climbing
author: Eric J. Hörst
date: '2025-10-31'
categories:
- Sports & Recreation
- Book
image: cover.jpg
subtitle: ★★★ | The Definitive Guide to Improving Your Performance
rating: 3
body-class: project-detail-view
include-before-body:
  text: '<div style=''margin-top: 50px;''></div>'
---


<style>
  #quarto-margin-sidebar {
    padding-top: 50px;
  }
</style>

# Training for Climbing
Some good info, more about scheduling and the 3-2-1 training plan and how rest is impt

## Reading Journey

- 2025-10-31: Finished
